entities.man: a shopkeeper in a velvet vest
entities.ring: a diamond ring on a display cushion

scenes.title: The Jewelry Shop
scenes.background_prompt: A small jewelry shop with glass display cases, velvet-lined trays, a brass lamp, and a magnifying glass on the counter. Warm interior lighting. No people, no jewelry on display.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A small jewelry shop with warm interior lighting. A man shopkeeper in a deep brown velvet vest and white blouse stands behind a glass counter, holding a small velvet box open toward the viewer. Inside the box, resting on a tiny satin cushion, a diamond ring catches the light brilliantly — the faceted stone refracts light into tiny rainbows on the velvet surface around it. The ring is immaculate and gleaming. Glass display cases line the walls, showing necklaces and bracelets on velvet-lined trays. A brass desk lamp illuminates the counter, and a jeweler's magnifying glass sits beside a tray of tiny tools. The carpet is a deep burgundy.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place man behind the glass counter, standing and holding open a small velvet box. Place ring on the tiny satin cushion inside the box, diamond refracting light into tiny rainbows.
scenes.scene_description: Starting at the bottom foreground, the scene features dark brown wooden floorboards running horizontally. Resting on the floor is a large, polished wooden jewelry display counter with a glass front and a curved right side. Inside the glass case, on the left, are four rectangular wooden trays lined with dark purple velvet, arranged in two rows of two on two separate shelves. In the curved right section of the case, a fifth identical tray is tilted upward. All trays inside the case are empty. On the wooden countertop, starting from the left, sits a brass desk lamp with a circular base and a glowing yellow dome-shaped shade. To its right lies a magnifying glass with a silver rim and a dark brown wooden handle. Further right on the counter is a stack of three shallow wooden trays with dark purple lining. Standing behind the counter is an elderly man with grey hair, a grey mustache, and round black-rimmed glasses. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt under a brown vest and is smiling as he holds open a small teal jewelry box with both hands. Inside the box is a gold ring featuring a large, sparkling white diamond that emits colorful light rays. The interior walls are pale olive green, decorated with large rectangular panels outlined in dark brown wooden molding. Above the man hangs a brass light fixture with a petal-shaped design and a glowing yellow bulb. To the right of the man is a large, arched window with a thick wooden frame, showing a bright daytime outdoor scene. Through the window, a dirt path winds through a lush green forest under a light blue sky with fluffy white clouds. Small yellow and white flowers and green clovers are scattered in the grass near the path. Another petal-shaped brass light fixture hangs from the ceiling in front of the window. To the far right, the olive green wall continues with another decorative wooden wall panel.
